content.claim: An incoming 2026 governance reform will restructure but not abolish the tankerület system, with plans to restore principal autonomy and municipal input while retaining centralized multi-tier authority over closure decisions.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Hungarian education system lens
limitations: Reform is still in planning stages and final implementation structure is not yet fixed
Precise allocation of closure authority between tankerületi centers and municipalities remains unspecified in available sources
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
